verses.text: They follow the ark at a distance to cross Jordan. The ark. God's presence leads the way.
They follow the ark at a distance to cross Jordan. The ark. God's presence leads the way.
They follow the ark at a distance to cross Jordan. The ark. God's presence leads the way.
They follow the ark at a distance to cross Jordan. The ark. God's presence leads the way.
'Sanctify yourselves: for to morrow the LORD will do wonders.' Sanctify. Prepare for God's work.
'Sanctify yourselves: for to morrow the LORD will do wonders.' Sanctify. Prepare for God's work.
God will magnify Joshua as He did Moses. Magnified. God confirms His leader.
God will magnify Joshua as He did Moses. Magnified. God confirms His leader.
When the priests' feet touch the water, it shall be cut off. The sign. Faith steps first.
When the priests' feet touch the water, it shall be cut off. The sign. Faith steps first.
When the priests' feet touch the water, it shall be cut off. The sign. Faith steps first.
When the priests' feet touch the water, it shall be cut off. The sign. Faith steps first.
When the priests' feet touch the water, it shall be cut off. The sign. Faith steps first.
The waters part; Israel crosses on dry ground. Crossed. God opens the way again.
